zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Hakeluyt於大約1315年出生在英國賀福爾時，她的父親Edmund Hakeluyt27歲，母親Emma29歲。她於1339年與Reynold FitzHerbert在英國薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1362年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特米德頌 諾頓享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Hakeluyt于大约1315年出生在英国賀福爾时，她的父亲Edmund Hakeluyt27岁，母亲Emma29岁。她于1339年与Reynold FitzHerbert在英国薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1362年在英国英格兰薩默塞特米德頌 諾頓享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Hakeluyt was born about 1315, in Herefordshire, England, her father, Edmund Hakeluyt, was 27 and her mother, Emma, was 29. She married Reynold FitzHerbert in 1339, in Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1362, in Midsomer Norton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Hakeluyt est née environ 1315, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Edmund Hakeluyt, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Emma, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Reynold FitzHerbert en 1339, à Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1362, à Midsomer Norton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Hakeluyt um 1315 in Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund Hakeluyt 27 und ihre Mutter Emma 29. Sie hat 1339 in Somerset, England Reynold FitzHerbert geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Hakeluyt è nata il circa 1315 nel Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Edmund Hakeluyt, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Emma, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Reynold FitzHerbert nel 1339, nel Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1362, nel Midsomer Norton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Hakeluytが約1315年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Edmund Hakeluytは27歳，母Emmaは29歳であった。1339年にイギリスソメルセトでReynold FitzHerbertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1362年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトミドソマー ノートンで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Hakeluyt(이)가 대략 1315년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund Hakeluyt(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1339년 영국 서머세트에서 Reynold FitzHerbert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1362년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 미드소머 노르턴에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Hakeluyt nasceu aproximadamente 1315, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund Hakeluyt, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Emma, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Reynold FitzHerbert em 1339, em Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1362, em Midsomer Norton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Hakeluyt родилась около 1315 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Edmund Hakeluyt было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reynold FitzHerbert в 1339 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1362 г. в местности мидсомир нортон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Hakeluyt nació aproximadamente 1315, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Edmund Hakeluyt, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Emma, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Reynold FitzHerbert en 1339, en Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1362, en Midsomer Norton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años.
